hyperedges.label: Pair-mode SDLC phases (discovery/architecture/sprint)
Six-folder docs/ as skill read/write substrate
Polly auto-trigger mechanism across tools

hyperedges.relation: FPF six-phase reasoning flow (Init -> Abduct -> Deduce -> Decide)
Combined requirement-quality stack explicitly referenced in INVEST applicative notes
Three governance actions for stale evidence in FPF B.3.4

hyperedges.label: Quint FPF command-tool invocation cluster
spec-to-workitem adapter family (pluggable tracker adapters)
observability-debug adapter family (pluggable telemetry backends)
NONoise architectural workflow steps
Observability adapter trio
Architectural workflow (3-step)
Access-first consumers
Polly SDLC Orchestration Cluster
BMAD Persona Skills (Isa, Alex) + NONoise Customization
Impeccable Vendored Design Suite
Craft Flow consolidates all design reference docs
Critique skill uses scoring + personas + cognitive-load triad
Multiple skills warn against same AI slop patterns (gradients, glassmorphism, generic fonts, hero metrics)
Skill Creator Evaluation Triad (Grader + Comparator + Analyzer)
Impeccable Design Skill Cluster (colorize + overdrive share context protocol)
Deprecated Superpowers Commands (all redirect to skills)
Systematic debugging skill + its supporting techniques
Pressure-test battery validating skill resists rationalization (time, sunk cost, authority) vs academic baseline
Superpowers pipeline: brainstorm -> writing-plans -> executing-plans/subagent-driven -> finishing-branch
Code review loop: request -> review -> receive feedback
Skill authoring discipline: TDD for docs + persuasion + Anthropic best practices
Subagent-driven task pipeline: implementer -> spec reviewer -> code quality reviewer
Requirements ingestion pipeline: raw docs -> md-extractor -> requirements-ingest -> arch-brainstorm
NONoise multi-repo workspace workflow (clone -> switch-branch -> pull) driven by repositories.json
docs-hierarchy-six-folder
docs-hierarchy-six-folder (multi-repo variant)
